project_reference.core_research_question: Can gnosis-indus be migrated into a truthful standalone anchor application and evidence repo without losing the scientific caveats that justify the lane?
project_reference.current_focus: Phase 03 Plan 01 complete: PRD closed end-to-end. Front door (README), authority snapshot, PRD §8, TODO, and init checklist all agree with the post-Phase-02 reality. Two of four PRD §8 blockers closed (extracted runtime, clean-machine replay); two remain owner-bound and visible (image rights, owner-deferred license/contact). Staged scaffold is promotion-ready up to its admitted limits.

scope.question: Can gnosis-indus be migrated into a truthful standalone anchor application and evidence repo without losing the scientific caveats that justify the lane?
in_scope: minimal starter package and smoke path
source, data, migration, and export boundaries
out_of_scope: cuneiform or shared-kernel extraction beyond boundary notes
unresolved_questions: What final release metadata will the owner supply?

user_asserted_anchors: The top acceptance gate is sovereign.
Runtime truth and artifact truth outrank prose.
Treat search as an in-repo application surface.
known_good_baselines: copied authority docs plus corrected control-plane docs
context_gaps: final public license and contact data are owner-deferred

formulations: Freeze the boundary before extracting code.
Treat copied authority docs as the baseline.
Use fetch surfaces when rights or size block vendoring.
allowed_estimator_families: minimal Python namespace and smoke path
stop_and_rethink_conditions: A cleaner narrative would require hiding the Phase 4 caveat.
The repo boundary would require splitting search into a fake separate product.

observables.name: truth-surface coherence
observables.definition: Whether README, authority snapshot, PRD, and boundary docs agree with the copied verdict surfaces.

observables.name: starter smoke path
observables.definition: Whether the staged package compiles, imports, and retains required authority docs.

claims.statement: The repo preserves the corrected anchor application and evidence posture for the Indus lane.
The staged repo contains a usable standalone starter surface for later extraction work.

deliverables.description: Compact current authority block for the staged repo
Repo scope and extraction boundary surface

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-anchor-application
acceptance_tests.procedure: Compare README, AUTHORITY_SNAPSHOT.md, and PRD against the copied authority docs.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: No promoted claim contradicts the copied authority bundle.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-anchor-application
acceptance_tests.procedure: Check SOURCE_BOUNDARY.md and DATA_POLICY.md for search-boundary, caveat, and rights coherence.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Search stays in-repo, caveats stay visible, and rights posture is explicit.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-repo-starter
acceptance_tests.procedure: Run the starter smoke path defined in SMOKE_TESTS.md.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The starter package compiles, imports, and required authority files exist.

position.last_activity_desc: Executed Phase 03 Plan 01 (truth-preserving packaging): brought README, AUTHORITY_SNAPSHOT, PRD §8, TODO, and WORKSTREAM_GPD_INIT_CHECKLIST into agreement with the post-Phase-02 reality. Split PRD §8 promotion blockers into 'Currently open' (image rights, owner-deferred license/contact) and 'Closed in Phase 02' (extracted runtime → src/gnosis_indus/search_surface/; clean-machine replay → pip install -e .[test] && pytest -q, 14 passed). Re-ran pytest = 14 passed; compileall src clean; PRD §1.3 falsification battery clean.

intermediate_results: Starter package root created under src/gnosis_indus/
Boundary docs and export contract written
First extraction slice chosen: phase4_search_demo.py -> src/gnosis_indus/search_surface/
Phase 4 catalogue and Phase 5 falsification families sequenced as explicit second and third waves
DATA_POLICY first-slice classification table admits derived cluster tables and catalogue JSON as PUBLIC_LATER
SMOKE_TESTS now declares a real Phase 02 stronger smoke (pip install -e .[test] && pytest -q) replacing the prior aspirational text
src/gnosis_indus/search_surface/ landed (Catalogue, SearchEngine, load_demo_fixture); pure stdlib; clean-room reimplementation anchored to authority/review_pack/search_demo_summary.md
artifacts/phase4/indus_catalogue_demo_fixture.json bundled (4 clusters, 8 fully-encoded inscriptions, 19 partial inscriptions; M-6A trimmed to the 4-token raw/cluster pair the doc actually shows)

tests/test_search_surface.py reproduces queries 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 10 from the authority doc on the fixture; query 10 fully reproduces (5/5); queries 6/9 assert subset containment under the doc's '... and N more' truncation
Latency gate < 100 ms verified locally on Python 3.11 (sub-millisecond)
open_questions: What final release metadata will the owner supply?

decisions.summary: Keep gnosis-indus as an anchor application and evidence repo.
decisions.rationale: The corrected control plane ranks it as the evidence-bearing anchor.
Current evidence supports an application surface, not a sovereign repo.

decisions.summary: Preserve the Phase 4 caveat across front-door docs.
decisions.rationale: Packaging cannot outrun the copied authority docs.

decisions.summary: First extraction slice chosen: phase4_search_demo.py -> src/gnosis_indus/search_surface/.
decisions.rationale: Lowest rights-gate risk (derived cluster IDs only), smallest helper-dependency footprint, and cleanest stronger-smoke-path story. Phase 4 catalogue and Phase 5 falsification families follow as explicit second and third waves.

decisions.summary: Pivot to clean-room reimplementation of the search-without-decode slice from the admitted Phase 4 Track C authority document, instead of copying scripts/indus/phase4_search_demo.py from the original monorepo.
decisions.rationale: The original source script is not accessible from this machine (mdfind on the local machine and find /workspace on the pod both empty; the original repo path /Users/Zer0pa/ZPE/ZPE-Cipher does not exist here). authority/review_pack/search_demo_summary.md is admitted authority and contains a complete enough functional spec (API names, latency gate, cluster memberships for 4 clusters, sample encodings for 8 inscriptions, and 10 ground-truth query records) to build a reference implementation whose outputs are anchored to the doc rather than invented. A clean-room is strictly more standalone than a copy that drags in monorepo helpers, and aligns with the AGENTS.md success criterion 'the repo becomes more standalone without becoming less truthful'. No monorepo helpers were dragged in; the slice is pure stdlib with numpy exposed only as an optional extra.

custom_conventions.baseline_comparator: copied authority docs plus corrected control-plane docs
custom_conventions.workspace_root: the directory that owns this .gpd folder

propagated_uncertainties: Final license and public contact are owner-deferred.
Runtime dependency list for the Phase 02 slice is now frozen at stdlib-only; numpy is exposed as an optional extra (gnosis-indus[numerics]) and is not used by any current code path.
pending_todos: Out-of-PRD next wave: extract first clean Phase 4 runtime slice into src/gnosis_indus/catalogue/ (per MIGRATION_PLAN.md, SOURCE_BOUNDARY.md).
Out-of-PRD next wave: extract first clean Phase 5 runtime slice into src/gnosis_indus/falsification/ (per MIGRATION_PLAN.md).
Out-of-PRD next wave: add fetch manifests for image and full-catalogue families (DATA_POLICY.md; image rights remain owner-bound).
Owner-bound: replace OWNER_DEFERRED license text and public contact (LICENSE_PLACEHOLDER.md, docs/LEGAL_BOUNDARIES.md).

session.stopped_at: PRD complete; staged scaffold is promotion-ready up to its admitted limits (two PRD §8 blockers closed by Phase 02; two remain owner-bound and visible in AUTHORITY_SNAPSHOT.md and PRD §8).
